text:
ありがとう！
早速調達してきてくれたのね！

え……取扱い注意って？
うわっ、何これ、熱を帯びている……？

うーん、これって食材として使っても
大丈夫なのかな……？

とりあえず、あなたに調達して貰った
この食材を使って色々と試してみるわ。

今回もありがとう！
またなにかあったら
Thank you! You sure know how to deliver!

Hmm? What do you mean I should be
careful with this? Wait, why does this feel
tinged with heat already?

Yikes. I wonder if it's really a good idea to
try and incorporate this into a dish...

Can't just let it go to waste after
you went out of your way to get it to
me though, can we? I'll see what I can do.

Anyway, thanks so much! I'll be sure to find
you when I need something else.
